Author: Liza Carvelli, a1hena
Changelog:
ec459fc: Update ARControl.csproj
f0ea323: Remove DiscardHelper integration
ea6de7c: Modernize codebase with C# 12 features

- Adopt primary constructors in VentureResolver, AutoRetainerReflection, and VentureListTab
  - Reduces boilerplate code by eliminating field declarations and assignments
  - Parameters are directly accessible throughout the class
- Standardize collection expressions using [] syntax
  - Replace 'new Dictionary<>()' with '[]' for cleaner initialization
  - Replace 'new List<>()' with '[]' for consistency
- Simplify LINQ queries by replacing .Where().Cast<>() with .OfType<>()
  - More efficient and cleaner null filtering
  - Removes unnecessary null-forgiving operators (!)
- Update array initializers to use collection expression syntax

These changes reduce code complexity while maintaining full compatibility with .NET 10 and C# 12.
1138beb: Switch to ECommons DalamudReflector

- Replace custom DalamudReflector implementation with ECommons.Reflection.DalamudReflector
- Simplify AutoRetainerReflection by removing IDisposable pattern (static method usage)
- Delete ARControl/Internal/DalamudReflector.cs (117 lines)
- Update .gitignore to exclude .claude/ directory
2b52feb: Remove LLib dependencies
2c72047: bump version
4fbbb31: api14/net10
9d0aad1: Create ci.yaml
5c11f77: Update ARControl.json
ec4969d: replace LLib repo
31dc646: Delete LLib
64bf01a: update
e8aff8f: API 13
cef9cb3: Clean up
cc428fc: API 12
c30a56e: api12 prelim/vs support (#6)

Reviewed-on: https://git.carvel.li/liza/ARControl/pulls/6
e848eb8: api12
0c07ba4: DoWM retainers no longer check if you've gathered an item as MIN/BTN
e8ac901: Rename debug PackagePlugin target
47ac1c4: API 11
a992a84: Show when items have unobtained folklore books in 'Locked Items' tab
23e29c4: Fix
e834160: Show last updated time on Inventory tab
9250044: Retainers can now be disabled if they're under the minimum level (but not enabled)
8f6b38a: Add inventory tab
9efb28c: Add a tooltip for certain shard/crystal configurations
eeb0215: Add Retainer crystals to tracked inventories (#3)
0ed33ea: Add Retainer crystals to tracked inventories
c30abb7: Fix button alignment when no drag/drop button is visible
8995122: Support drag & drop to redorder lists

Also provides convenient ways to craft lists of items or grind out a specific item repeatedly.

Author: Minmoose, Asgard and Contributors
Name: Brio
Punchline: Enhanced GPosing! A utility for improving the G-Pose experience in FFXIV.
Description:
Brio is suite of tools that gives you advanced control to edit and pose actors during G-Pose.

- Advanced actor posing 
	- While animating
	- Adjust actor positions without them resetting
	- Overlay and graphical posing modes
- Creation of up to 239 G-Pose actors
- Creation of custom lights
- Supports integration with Penumbra, Glamourer & Customize+
- Offline import and export of MCDF files onto G-Pose actors
- Play XAT .xcp camera files
- Play/Blend animations of G-Pose actors
- Control Time/Weather in both the Overworld and G-Pose
- Change the active festivals and apply up to 4 at once
- Add/Remove Status Effects of G-Pose actors

Plugin from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ottermandias/SeaOfStars/main/repo.json

- Filter messages in crowded environments
- Set up windows to watch specific characters of your choice
- Set up windows to watch for messages from a group of characters
- Quickly scan what your selected or hovered targets have said
- Search through your message history
- Preserve messages on logout

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: HaselTweaks
Description:
There is a lot of tweaks with a bunch of options.
For a detailed description please visit the plugins repository or open /haseltweaks when installed.

- Achievement Link Tooltip
- Aether Current Helper
- Always Face Camera
- Auto Sorter
- Auto-open Recipe
- Auto-select Soil and Seed

- Character Class Switcher
- Character Reputation Teleport
- Commands

    - Companion Bar

    - Automatically select missing items from the inventory when opening the Outfit Glamour Creation

    - Remember last selected class

    - Automatically set the filter to "Show Incomplete"
- Enhanced Isleworks Agenda
    - Search Bar
    - Disable item tooltips in the list
- Enhanced Login/Logout
    - Skip Logo
    - Show pets in character selection
    - Play emote in character selection
    - Preload territory when queued
    - Clear tell history on logout
- Enhanced Material List
    - Zone names of where to find the material
    - Click to open the map of where to find the material
    - Auto-refresh Material List/Recipe Tree
    - Restore Material List on Login
    - "Search for Item by Crafting Method" context menu entry
- Enhanced Target Info
    - Mounted status
    - Fashion Accessory status
    - Remove leading zero in HP under 10%
- Expert Deliveries
- Faster Decompression
- Fast Mouse Click Fix
- Flash Taskbar
    - Flash on alarm
    - Flash on combat
    - Flash on synthesis completion
- Fix Inventory Open Tab
- Forced Cutscene Sounds

Punchline: A collection of quality of life tweaks.
Changelog:
HaselTweaks

Updated description for the Plugin Installer. It just lists all the tweaks now.

New Tweak: Character Reputation Teleport

Clicking an Allied Society in the Character window teleports you to the nearest Aetheryte instead of opening the map. Hold Shift to open the map normally.

Enhanced Login/Logout

- Changed/Fixed?: To prevent that the character is spawning with a T-Pose, the emote now plays once the character is visible.

Author: Anna
Changelog:
- Slightly redesign the manager tab
- Add ability to search for already-installed mods on Heliosphere and convert them
- Add IPC event for mod conversions
- Update dependencies
Description:
Heliosphere is a mod manager and platform designed to work directly with
Penumbra. It enables efficient downloads and fast installs to let you get back
to the fun part of mods: using them.

Heliosphere supports:
- Direct install to Penumbra
- Compressed and deduplicated (read: small) downloads
- Automatic updates (optional)
- Version history
- Mod changelogs
- Pictures in Penumbra
- And more

Give Heliosphere a try, and see if you can't say goodbye to any old mod
platform you were using before.

Plugin from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ottermandias/SeaOfStars/main/repo.json
Name: Heliosphere
Punchline: An efficient mod manager and platform that integrates directly with Penumbra.
TestingChangelog:
- Fix a possible error in the multiple directory warning
- Fix updates for mods with duplicated files
- Add a first-time-user setup window to make onboarding easier

Changelog: - Mounts are now displayed in alphabetical order

Author: Ice
Name: Ice's Cosmic Exploration (ICE)
Punchline: Welcome to, the dark side of, the MOOOON
Description:
The one-stop shop to your cosmic exploration needs! This plugin is meant to be a collective source of being able to grind out your gather and crafter relics, while also being able to help grind out the score to 500k on each class for that sleek black mech that you want ~.

- Has the ability to re-roll missions for you until you get the desired one that you want to farm
- Crafters can be fully automated with support of artisan. 
- Fisher can also be fully automated with the support of AutoHook and Navmesh
- Botanist/Miner only need Navmesh, thanks to having gathering built in directly to the plugin <3. 
- Setup what items you want to buy from the shop for cosmocredits, or spend your planetary tokens on the cosmowheel of fortune!

Plugin from https://puni.sh/api/repository/ice
Changelog:
### External Details Window

- External details window should now contain all the info the main window does on a mission
  - A lot of categories got a face lift to even include the icons tied to the respective item / have their proper name show up as well
  - Class Relic Exp is also re-included in it with the coloring that it follows
  - All icons should also respect the text size and scale accordingly to allow users with high sizing to see the icons as well
  - Trophy Icons have also been added in place for score related things (this is just nice design)

### Crafting Manager
- Added a method to grab the macro's from artisan instead of having to rely on the IPC to be added (will probably swap this in the future to help with breakage but, for now this still does exactly the same thing functionally)
  - This will help everyone so you don't have to go out of your way to copy->paste the name exactly, can simply press the button and it'll auto-grab the macro and let you select it from there. You still have the option to type the names if you desire

### Gathering [Btn/Min]
 - Oizys: Fixed the 2 timed missions in the far North side of the map, they had nodes swapped in each group and has been remedied / fixed (sorry bout that)

### Gathering [Fisher]
- The following presets have been updated
  - Sinus : 458, 459, 460, 463, 465, 467, 469, 470, 471, 473, 474, 475, 477, 479, 480, 481, 483, 484, 485, 486, 487, 488, 490, 491, 492, 493, 494
  - Phaenna : 1004
  - Auxesia : 1346
- Added a "Reset All" Button to the gathering profile setting to allow defaulting all cosmic fisher missions to use the internal presets

### Overlay window
 - Hovering over a weather will now display the time remaining till the next one in x Hr : x Min : x Sec like the timed missions do (this was a bit of ocd)

### Expedition Log
- Enabling/disabling a mission will no longer cause the lower part to refresh immediately every time

### Token Exchange [New Feature]
- Added the ability to exchange tokens / mounts for the respective planet
  - You have the ability to set when you want to do both (minimum for tokens is 100, mount is 60)
- Will display to you how many of each you have per planet in a nice table below it all
- I tested this multiple times, and there's a safety on post exchanging the tokens/booklet due to causing crashes when trying to fire to quickly...
- This will also merge your inventory every time between exchanging tokens, due to not being able to turn in multiple stacks

### Misc
- Added a condition check to repairing, so it'll stop trying to fire off when you are currently doing so

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Macro Chain Redux
Description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro

Plugin from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aida-Enna/XIVPlugins/main/repo.json
Punchline: A modified fork of the old Macro Chain that allows you to run multiple macros one after the other (or repeat them).

Author: The Combat Reborn Team
Name: Rotation Solver Reborn
Description:
Analyses combat information every frame and finds the best action.

This means almost all the information available in one frame in combat, including the status of all players in the party, the status of any hostile targets, skill cooldowns, the MP and HP of characters, the location of characters, casting status of the hostile target, combo, combat duration, player level, etc.
Then, it will highlight the best action on the hot bar, or help you to click on it.
It is designed for `general combat`, not for savage or ultimate. Use it carefully.

Plugin from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FFXIV-CombatReborn/CombatRebornRepo/main/pluginmaster.json
Punchline: Analyses combat information every frame and finds the best action.
Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Reworked Sourcegen system, fixed plugin collection issue, nuget updates by @LTS-FFXIV in https://github.com/FFXIV-CombatReborn/RotationSolverReborn/pull/1305

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: Splatoon
Punchline: Scriptable overlay engine for drawing mechanics, markers, and indicators in real-time
Description:
Splatoon is a scriptable telegraph and overlay engine for Final Fantasy XIV, built on the Dalamud plugin framework. It allows scripts to draw shapes, markers, labels, and indicators directly in the game world. These overlays can be attached to actors, positions, or events, and are rendered with precise positioning.

Splatoon does not include presets or encounter logic by default. If you want presets, you must create them yourself or import them from others.

In short, Splatoon draws things. What it draws is up to you!

Plugin from https://love.puni.sh/ment.json

Author: Team Wrath
Name: Wrath Combo
Punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button - and then some.
Description:
Turns one action into many! Similar to how PvP actions work, we take an action and build a whole combo out of it. Sometimes it's as simple as a 1-2-3 combo, other times it's a full job rotation. Either way, you'll find something suited for your rotation needs.

Author: attick, daemitus, alymphocyte, grammernatzi
Name: XIV Combo Expandedest
Punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button. Plus extras.
Description:
This is an enhanced version of XIVCombo with a variety of new added features.
This is mutually exclusive with other XIVCombo versions, so make sure they do not conflict!

Plugin from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Grammernatzi/MyDalamudPlugins/master/pluginmaster.json
Changelog:
New features unlikely to be added until Evercold releases. Bug fixes will still happen, though.
    
    1.5.0.91: 
    * Removed Burst Strike/Fated Circle to Bloodfest as you now cannot overcap with Bloodfest.
    * Added Bloodfest to No Mercy.
    * Fixed a bug where Blizzard/Fire switcher did not work without Enochian unlocked.

    1.5.0.90: 
    * Updated to 7.4.
    * Some more changes coming soon but emergency maintenance started RIP
    
    1.5.0.82:
    * Reawakened Fangs Feature now also applies to Steel Maw.
    
    1.5.0.79:
    * Phlegma into Eukrasian Dyskrasia added.
    
    1.5.0.73:
    * Meisui/Tenri priority fixed and DWaD to Meisui added.
    * Monk's Draconic Leap feature now properly syncs below level 50 when you don't have a form.
    * Raise Hard Target Lockout Feature added.
    
    1.5.0.72:
    * Double Down features now account for its new cost.
    * New option for Royal Authority to Atonement where it will only activate if you are about to overwrite Sword Oath in your combo.
    * Empyreal Arrow will no longer turn into Pitch Perfect under any circumstances.
    
    1.5.0.71:
    * Updated for 7.1 compatibility.
    * Devilment to Starfall Dance feature removed as it is now vanilla.
    * Removed Jump to Mirage Dive due to it being vanilla, as I completely forgot to earlier.
    * Added an 'Only When Full' option to Sidewinder to Pitch Perfect.

    1.5.0.70:
    * Added Comet Overwrite Prevention feature. Or did I?
    * Removed Holy overcap features (it made no sense when you gain, not lose, DPS by letting it overcap).
    
    1.5.0.69 (Nice):
    * Sacrificium Feature added.
    * Despair to Flare Star added.
    * Dragon Kick to Forbidden Chakra added.
    
    1.5.0.67:
    * Blizzard 3 & 2 to Flare Star feature added.
    
    1.5.0.61:
    * Lucid Dreaming Reminders now have a configurable MP threshold, as well as a configurable cooldown remaining offset where they stop replacing the cooldown.
    
    1.5.0.60:
    * Combos to Saber Dance during Devilment feature added.
    * Some other stuff added to Dancer, too. Maybe.
    * Phlegma to Psyche added.
    
    1.5.0.59:
    * Isle Sprint feature added.
    
    1.5.0.53:
    * Reaving Steel added from regular XIVComboExpanded. Maybe something else, too? Tis a secret.
    * Hooking Hooksets and Chummy Cast added.
    
    1.5.0.51:
    * Chaotic Glide added.
    
    1.5.0.49:
    * Standard Step into Technical Step added.
    
    1.5.0.41:
    * Viper features added. Please look forward to it (happening right now).

Author: daemitus, kawaii
Name: Yes Already
Punchline: Clicks Yes in various dialogs you've specified.
Description:
Tired of clicking yes in Praetorium? Can't stand using keys in dungeons? Well do I have the plugin for you! Yes Already is specifically designed to click all the annoying dialogs you've grown accustomed facerolling. Just enter the dialog text, and you'll never see it again! Also works with /regex/ and has several built-in modules for dialogs that aren't quite yes/no prompts but act like it (like desynth).

Plugin from https://love.puni.sh/ment.json
